_doc: Town districts (OAKVALE T1). A large town's wards are classified by distance RING from the centre: the INNER core holds market/civic/temple/guild (walled, defended), the MIDDLE ring residential + craft, the OUTER ring residential + stables + farming (suburbs, outside the wall). `district_buildings` maps a district TYPE to the building KINDs its lots draw from (weighted by repetition). Seed counts scale with town size. Consumed by world/town/wards.py + (T4) lots.py.
